command: export MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1; docker kill shard-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1; docker rm shard-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1; exec docker run --rm -i --init --name shard-mcp -p 7777:8080 -v "$PWD/.shards:/root/.shards" -v "$PWD/app/dist:/srv:ro" -e HOME=/root -e SHARD_KEY="000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f" shard --mcp
